product_overview: American Dream Leasing is an interactive, browser-based sales deck for a large shopping mall destination. It presents the property through cinematic storytelling, data, imagery, and motion so prospective tenants, sponsors, and event partners can explore the opportunity without a live presenter.
core_goals: Show the property’s scale, energy, and differentiation through a self-guided experience
Help prospective retail tenants evaluate leasing opportunities
Help sponsors and brand partners evaluate activation and partnership opportunities
Help event promoters and producers evaluate venue and event booking opportunities
Guide viewers toward taking business action after exploring the deck

features.name: Cinematic Opening
features.description: An attention-grabbing introductory section that establishes the property’s scale, energy, and premium positioning immediately.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the opening experience -> Watch the cinematic intro -> Recognize the property’s scale and energy -> Continue exploring the deck

features.name: Why This Property
features.description: A story-driven overview of location, access, scale, visitor base, and regional reach presented in a visually compelling way.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the property overview section -> Review location and access information -> Review scale and audience data -> Understand why the property stands apart

features.name: Retail Leasing
features.description: A section that presents the retail environment, tenant mix, and growth trajectory to support leasing conversations.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the retail section -> Review the retail environment -> Review tenant and growth information -> Evaluate the property as a leasing opportunity

features.name: Luxury Positioning
features.description: A section that highlights elevated positioning and premium brand fit where applicable.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the luxury section -> View premium brand storytelling -> Assess the property’s high-end positioning -> Consider the property for luxury retail presence

features.name: Dining and Lifestyle
features.description: A section that frames food and lifestyle offerings as a core draw rather than a secondary amenity.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the dining and lifestyle section -> Explore food and lifestyle content -> Understand the role of dining in driving visitation -> Consider the property as a broader destination

features.name: Attractions and Entertainment
features.description: A section that showcases major experiential differentiators such as attractions, entertainment, and draw factors beyond shopping.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the attractions and entertainment section -> View experiential content -> Understand the property’s entertainment draw -> Consider the property as a destination beyond retail

features.name: Events and Platform
features.description: A section that positions the property as a venue for concerts, activations, appearances, and other large-scale experiences.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the events and platform section -> Review event storytelling and venue potential -> Understand hosting capabilities and platform value -> Consider the property for bookings or activations

features.name: Non-Linear Navigation
features.description: Section navigation that lets viewers move through the deck in their preferred order instead of following a fixed slide sequence.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through the page -> Click a navigation link to jump to a desired section -> Review that section -> Jump to another section of interest

features.name: Scroll-Based Storytelling
features.description: A motion-rich browsing experience where users discover sections by scrolling and viewing animations.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through the page -> Observe animated section transitions -> Continue through the content at their own pace -> Explore the full story

routes.description: Main landing page for American Dream Leasing

features.name: Navigation
user_interactions: Scroll down to see different sections
Click on navigation links to scroll to specific sections

features.name: Landing Sections
features.description: Various sections of the landing page
